image:image.image:title: Radiance Residency Building Exterior
image:image.image:caption: Front view of Radiance Residency boys hostel directly opposite Medicaps University, Pigdamber, Rau, Indore

image:image.image:title: Radiance Residency Side View
image:image.image:caption: Side angle view showing multi-floor structure of Radiance Residency hostel

image:image.image:title: Radiance Residency Daytime View
image:image.image:caption: Daytime view of the Radiance Residency hostel building in Pigdamber, Rau, Indore

image:image.image:title: Radiance Residency Nighttime View
image:image.image:caption: Illuminated nighttime view of Radiance Residency hostel building

image:image.image:title: Furnished Single Occupancy Room
image:image.image:caption: Fully furnished single occupancy room with bed, study table, wardrobe at Radiance Residency

image:image.image:title: Furnished Double Occupancy Room
image:image.image:caption: Double occupancy room with two beds and study desks at Radiance Residency boys hostel

image:image.image:title: AC Room at Radiance Residency
image:image.image:caption: Air-conditioned Superior room at Radiance Residency boys hostel near Medicaps

image:image.image:title: Spacious Room Layout
image:image.image:caption: Empty room layout view showing spacious dimensions at Radiance Residency

image:image.image:title: Private Attached Bathroom
image:image.image:caption: Private attached bathroom with hot water at Radiance Residency hostel

image:image.image:title: Clean Bathroom Interior
image:image.image:caption: Clean bathroom interior with modern fittings at Radiance Residency

image:image.image:title: Home-Style Meals at Radiance Residency
image:image.image:caption: Home-style nutritious meals served daily included in monthly fee

image:image.image:title: Lounge-Style Dining Area
image:image.image:caption: Lounge-style dining and common area at Radiance Residency hostel

image:image.image:title: Dedicated Study Area
image:image.image:caption: Quiet dedicated study area for resident students at Radiance Residency

image:image.image:title: RO Purified Drinking Water
image:image.image:caption: 24/7 RO purified drinking water access at Radiance Residency hostel

image:image.image:title: 24/7 CCTV and Wi-Fi
image:image.image:caption: 24/7 CCTV surveillance and high-speed Wi-Fi at Radiance Residency

image:image.image:title: Vehicle Parking Area
image:image.image:caption: Secure vehicle parking for bikes and cars at Radiance Residency hostel

image:image.image:title: On-Campus Mandir
image:image.image:caption: Mandir prayer space on Radiance Residency campus

image:image.image:title: Iron Service & Laundry
image:image.image:caption: Iron and laundry service available at Radiance Residency

image:image.image:title: Medicaps University — 2 Minute Walk
image:image.image:caption: Medicaps University directly opposite Radiance Residency, just 2 minutes walk

image:image.image:title: Radiance Residency Hero View
image:image.image:caption: Hero view of Radiance Residency hostel building and campus surroundings
